underlying_goal: Have the mayor agent check its hook and mail, then act on any hooked work, following a specific workflow protocol
friction_detail: Claude gave a confidently wrong explanation about gt commands working from anywhere, then when corrected, still didn't immediately re-run the hook from the correct directory until the user demanded it.
brief_summary: User wanted the mayor agent to check hook/mail and act; Claude completed the task but gave contradictory wrong explanations about directory behavior, frustrating the user.
